proof: function(x0: lib(rat.rat_base).Rat) { not x0.is_positive or lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(x0).is_positive }(lib(rat.rat_base).Rat.1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, Real.1) }

proof: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](f(x))
function(x0: Real) { not x0.abs.is_negative }(lib(functions).identity_fn(f(x)))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 >= x1 or x0 < x1 }(f(x).abs, Real.0)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 < Real.0 or x0.is_negative }(f(x).abs)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 + x1 < x2 + x1 or x0 < x2 }(f(x).abs, Real.1, Real.0)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0 >= x1 or not x0 < x1 }(f(x).abs, Real.0)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 or x0 < x1 }[Real](f(x).abs + Real.1, Real.0 + Real.1)
f(x).abs + Real.1 < Real.0 + Real.1
not f(x).abs < Real.0
f(x).abs < Real.0
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 - x1 != Real.0 or x0 = x1 }(Real.0 + Real.1, Real.1)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(Real.0, Real.1)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or x0 > Real.0 }(Real.1)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x1 > x2 or x0 > x2 }[Real](bound, Real.1, Real.0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 >= x1 or x0 > x1 or x0 = x1 }[Real](bound, Real.1)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 > Real.0 or x0.is_positive }(bound)

goal: continuous_condition(f, x, delta, Real.1) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta) implies f(x0).is_close(f(x), Real.1) }
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, f, Real.1)
continuous_condition(f, x, delta, Real.1)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or f(x0).is_close(f(x), Real.1) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), Real.1)) }(y)

goal: exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { k0.is_positive and k1.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, k0) implies f(x0).abs <= k1 } }
proof: delta.is_positive
function(x0: Real) { not exists(k0: Real) { x0.is_positive and k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x, x0) or f(x1).abs <= k0 } } }(delta)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_close(x, x0) or f(x2).abs <= x1 }) }(delta, bound)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_close(x, x0) or f(x2).abs <= x1 } or not (x0.is_positive and x1.is_positive) }(delta, bound)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and x1.is_positive) or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, x0) and not f(k0).abs <= x1 } }(delta, bound)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, x0) and not f(k0).abs <= x1 } }(delta, bound)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, x0) and not f(k0).abs <= bound } }(delta)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, delta) and not f(w0).abs <= bound }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or f(x0).abs <= bound }(w0)
